event: Still life with knife and garlic
description: A restrained still life set against a dark brown background. On a simple wooden table or chest with a visible front panel and edge, a dark-handled kitchen knife with a gleaming blade lies flat. Scattered beside it are several cloves and pieces of garlic, their pale yellowish-white forms catching the dim light. The composition is austere and meditative, rendered in a narrow tonal range of deep browns and muted creams. The brushwork is subtle, and the objects sit close to the table's edge, creating a sense of quiet intimacy.

_meta.title: Christ Glorified in the Court of Heaven
